bids.reasoning: Since this is the opening offer at the very beginning of the negotiation, I will propose a bid that maximizes my utility to establish a strong anchor. I am targeting my most preferred values across all issues, particularly on my highest-weighted issues F, E, and B, while I leave room for future concessions on my lower-weighted issues.

The opponent is aggressively claiming that time is running out, even though it is only t=0.02, so I will ignore their false urgency tactic. We already naturally align on issueE (valueA), and they desire valueA for issueD, which has 0 importance to my overall utility. I will match their request on issueD to show early cooperation while returning to my top choices on my most highly valued issues, particularly F and B.
